propertyManagement.metaTitle: HVAC service for condo property managers in Panama | 24clima
propertyManagement.metaDescription: Multi-unit AC maintenance contract for PH (Propiedad Horizontal) buildings in Panama City. Coordination with HOA boards, electronic DGI invoices, 24/7 emergency. Costa del Este, Punta Pacífica, Avenida Balboa.
propertyManagement.h1: HVAC service for PH property managers in Panama City
propertyManagement.heroLead: One PH. Two hundred units. Two hundred tenants. One single contract for all the cooling.
propertyManagement.heroSub: We work directly with administradoras and HOA boards: scheduled preventive maintenance, after-hours emergencies, electronic DGI invoice after every visit.
propertyManagement.section1Item1: Scheduled preventive maintenance (quarterly or monthly depending on plan).
propertyManagement.section1Item2: 24/7 emergencies with priority response for tenants of the tower.
propertyManagement.section1Item3: Signed report per unit serviced, with before/after photos.
propertyManagement.section1Item4: Electronic DGI invoice issued after every visit.
propertyManagement.section1Item5: Access coordination with the PH security, concierge and mailroom staff.
propertyManagement.section2Text: The owner is in Toronto. The tenant lives here. The administradora manages access. We are the fourth point: WhatsApp with everyone, written authorization before any repair, invoice issued to the PH and notified to the owner.
propertyManagement.section3Text: Lobby, corridor and hallway cooling is paid from the common fund. Individual splits are the owner's responsibility. We can serve both under the same contract, with separate rates and invoicing — one provider, two payment streams.
propertyManagement.section4Text: We deliver: electronic DGI invoice, per-unit report with equipment serial numbers, before/after photo log, and refrigerant-use certification (R-410A). Everything in a format ready for your accounting system.
propertyManagement.section5Step1: A 30-minute meeting with the administradora — virtual or in person. We need: number of units, equipment type (split / cassette / VRV if applicable), year the PH was built.
propertyManagement.section5Step2: Initial inspection at no cost: 1 day, 1 technician, walk-through of common areas and a random sample of units.
propertyManagement.section5Step3: Written proposal within 48 hours, with per-unit rate, scope and SLA.
propertyManagement.section5Step4: Contract signature — standard template ready to present to the HOA board.
propertyManagement.section6Text: We work in residential and mixed-use PH across Costa del Este, Punta Pacífica, Avenida Balboa, Marbella and Obarrio. By confidentiality we don't publish names — verifiable references are provided with the proposal.
propertyManagement.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions from property managers
propertyManagement.faq1Q: What's the minimum number of units for a contract?
propertyManagement.faq1A: Ten units. Below that, a one-off visit is more sensible — contractual coordination isn't worth it.
propertyManagement.faq2Q: Do you respond at night and weekends?
propertyManagement.faq2A: Yes. Emergencies receive 24/7 priority response for towers under contract; the first diagnostic visit happens within 4 hours during business hours and 6 hours outside of them.
propertyManagement.faq3Q: Can you invoice the PH and the owner separately?
propertyManagement.faq3A: Yes. Common areas billed to the PH, private units to the owner. One visit, two invoices. This is the most requested feature from administradoras handling towers with absentee owners.
propertyManagement.faq4A: Twelve months, with an optional quarterly trial. The trial includes one full maintenance and lets the HOA board validate quality before committing to the full year.
propertyManagement.faq5Q: Do you work with VRV systems or only splits?
propertyManagement.faq5A: Splits, mini-splits and cassettes are our strength. VRV/VRF systems and large chillers we assess case by case; if the scope exceeds our capacity we recommend specialized contractors at no commission.
propertyManagement.ctaFooterText: Send us via WhatsApp the tower name and approximate number of units. We respond with an estimated rate the same day.
propertyManagement.whatsappMessage: Hello, I manage a condo tower in Panama. I'd like to request a proposal for a multi-unit maintenance contract.
propertyManagement.servicesHandoff: Manage a tower or multiple apartments? Multi-unit plan →

maintenanceContract.h1: Air conditioning maintenance contract in Panama
maintenanceContract.heroLead: Three clear plans. Per-unit pricing. RUC invoice. No surprises.
maintenanceContract.heroSub: Designed for condo property managers, AirBnb hosts with multiple apartments, offices and retail in Panama City.
maintenanceContract.tierBasicDescription: One preventive visit every three months. Standard cleaning, filter check, pressure verification.
maintenanceContract.tierStandardDescription: Monthly preventive visit. Includes annual deep cleaning and antibacterial treatment.
maintenanceContract.tierPremiumDescription: Monthly + 24/7 emergencies with priority response. For residential towers and retail where downtime costs.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete air conditioning services in Panama.
services.urgentSubtitle: Our technicians are available to assist you immediately.

cleaning.title: Air Conditioner Deep Cleaning Service in Panama
cleaning.description: Professional air conditioner cleaning in Panama City. Removes mold, bacteria and bad odors. Improves equipment performance and air quality. Available 24/7.
cleaning.faq1Q: How often should I have my air conditioner cleaned?
cleaning.faq1A: We recommend a deep clean at least every 6–12 months, or more often if you use the unit daily or live in a dusty area.
cleaning.faq2A: It includes cleaning the filter, evaporator, drain pan and grilles. Optionally antibacterial treatment and refrigerant level check.
cleaning.faq3Q: Can you come the same day?
cleaning.faq3A: Yes. In Panama City and nearby areas we can often schedule same day or next day depending on availability.
cleaning.faq4Q: Is the price per unit or per visit?
cleaning.faq4A: The price is per unit. If you have multiple units, we offer quantity discounts; you can use the calculator on the page to see the total.
cleaning.faq5Q: Do you offer a warranty on the service?
cleaning.faq5A: Yes. We stand behind our work and you can contact us if any issue arises after the cleaning.

maintenance.title: Preventive Air Conditioner Maintenance in Panama
maintenance.description: Preventive air conditioner maintenance in Panama. Avoids costly repairs, extends equipment life and ensures clean air. Certified technicians available daily.
maintenance.faq1Q: How often should I have preventive maintenance?
maintenance.faq1A: Every 3–6 months is ideal, especially before peak use seasons. It helps prevent failures and extends equipment life.
maintenance.faq2Q: What do you check during maintenance?
maintenance.faq2A: We check filters, refrigerant levels, electrical connections, drainage and overall condition. Includes basic cleaning and a report.
maintenance.faq3A: Yes. We work with all air conditioner brands: split, window, central and mini-split.
maintenance.faq4Q: Can I sign up for a maintenance plan?
maintenance.faq4A: Yes. We offer periodic plans for homes and businesses; message us on WhatsApp for a custom quote.
maintenance.faq5Q: Does maintenance reduce the need for repairs?
maintenance.faq5A: In most cases yes. Regular maintenance catches issues early and reduces the risk of costly breakdowns.

repair.title: Air Conditioner Repair Service in Panama City
repair.description: Air conditioner repair in Panama City. Fast diagnosis, original parts and work guarantee. We service any brand and model across Panama City and surrounding areas.
repair.faq1A: Yes. We first run a diagnosis to find the cause; we give you a clear quote before doing the repair.
repair.faq2A: Yes, we use original or equivalent quality parts whenever possible to ensure durability.
repair.faq3A: Yes. We warranty the work; the period depends on the type of repair.
repair.faq4A: Yes. We have 24/7 emergency service for critical failures in Panama City and surrounding areas.
repair.faq5A: We service all brands: LG, Samsung, Mabe, Daikin, Carrier, York, and other split and window units.

installation.title: Professional Air Conditioner Installation in Panama
installation.description: Professional air conditioner installation in Panama. Includes wiring, brackets, functional test and area cleanup. Certified technicians with years of experience.
installation.faq1Q: How long does an installation take?
installation.faq1A: It depends on the unit type; a typical split installation usually takes 2–4 hours.
installation.faq2A: Yes. The quote can include piping, wiring, brackets and labour; we detail everything before starting.
installation.faq3A: Yes. We warranty the installation and proper operation of the unit.
installation.faq4Q: Can I buy the unit myself and only hire installation?
installation.faq4A: Yes. Many customers buy the unit and hire us only for installation; just ensure the unit is suitable for the space.
installation.faq5A: Panama City, Costa del Este, Punta Pacífica, Albrook, Clayton, Panama Pacifico and surrounding areas.

gasRecharge.title: AC Refrigerant Gas Recharge Service in Panama
gasRecharge.description: AC refrigerant gas recharge in Panama. If your unit is not cooling properly, we recharge with original refrigerant gas. Fast, guaranteed service across Panama City.
gasRecharge.faq1Q: How do I know if my unit needs a gas recharge?
gasRecharge.faq1A: If the air is not cooling well, the unit shuts off or there is ice on the lines, it may need refrigerant. We check to confirm.
gasRecharge.faq2Q: What type of gas do you use?
gasRecharge.faq2A: We use refrigerant that matches the unit (R-410A, R-32, R-22 as applicable). We use certified refrigerants.
gasRecharge.faq3Q: Do you check for leaks before recharging?
gasRecharge.faq3A: Yes. We check for leaks before recharging; if there is a leak we recommend repairing it first so the charge holds.
gasRecharge.faq4Q: How long does a recharge last?
gasRecharge.faq4A: If there is no leak, a charge can last years. If the level drops soon, it usually indicates a leak that should be fixed.
gasRecharge.faq5A: Yes. We warranty the recharge service; if an undetected leak appears we will recheck within the warranty period at no extra cost.

emergency.title: 24/7 Emergency Air Conditioner Service in Panama
emergency.description: 24/7 emergency air conditioner service in Panama City. We handle critical failures at any time, including weekends and holidays. Call us now for immediate assistance.
emergency.faq1A: Yes. Emergency service is available 24 hours, every day, including weekends and holidays.
emergency.faq2Q: When is it considered an emergency?
emergency.faq2A: Major water leaks, burning smell, unit not turning on in peak heat or unusual noises that suggest serious failure.
emergency.faq3A: In Panama City and nearby we aim to arrive within 1–2 hours depending on availability and traffic.
emergency.faq4A: Emergency service has an additional fee for immediate availability; we will quote when you contact us.
emergency.faq5Q: What areas do you cover for emergencies?
emergency.faq5A: Panama City, Costa del Este, Punta Pacífica, Albrook, Clayton, Panama Pacifico and surrounding areas.

eventCooling.metaTitle: Air Conditioning Rental for Events in Panama | 24clima
eventCooling.metaDescription: Temporary cooling for tents, expos, conferences, weddings and corporate events in Panama. Technical site visit, installation and support. Quote via WhatsApp.
eventCooling.h1: Air conditioning and cooling rental for events in Panama
eventCooling.heroLead: We cool tents, terraces, expos, conferences and corporate events — with a technical assessment, installation and WhatsApp support.
eventCooling.heroSub: In Panama the problem is not just the heat: it is the humidity. We design a realistic cooling solution based on the space, the climate, the number of people and the available power.
eventCooling.heroMicro: Send us the date, location, schedule, photos of the area and an estimated headcount.
eventCooling.useCasesTitle: Cooling for events where the heat cannot fail
eventCooling.uc8: Construction sites, warehouses and temporary cooling
eventCooling.whyTitle: In Panama, fans and misting are not always enough
eventCooling.why1: High humidity reduces the effectiveness of evaporative cooling and misting.
eventCooling.why2: A tent closed up because of rain can feel hotter and more humid than an open space.
eventCooling.why3: Direct sun, poor ventilation and a large crowd completely change the heat-load calculation.
eventCooling.why4: Comfortable guests stay longer and complain less — comfort is part of the production.
eventCooling.howTitle: From quote to pickup, we coordinate the whole cooling setup
eventCooling.step1: Assessment via WhatsApp or a technical site visit, depending on the size of the event.
eventCooling.step2: Equipment, capacity and placement recommendation based on area, people and sun exposure.
eventCooling.step3: Review of available power, drainage and access; coordination with a generator if needed.
eventCooling.step4: Delivery and installation before the event.
eventCooling.step5: A test run before the first guest arrives.
eventCooling.step6: On-site support during the event (optional) and coordinated pickup afterwards.
eventCooling.pkg1Text: For specific zones: booth, registration, backstage, DJ booth, kitchen or equipment room.
eventCooling.pkg2Text: For weddings, corporate cocktails, church events and restaurant terraces. Includes a site review and an airflow distribution plan.
eventCooling.pkg3Text: For VIP events, conferences, summits and launches. Pre-event inspection, power coordination and a support technician during the event.
eventCooling.pkg4Text: For construction sites, warehouses, temporary offices and equipment rooms. Rental by day, week or month.
eventCooling.techTitle: It is not just placing machines: it is calculating heat, humidity, airflow and power
eventCooling.tech1: Assessment of square meters, number of people and sun exposure.
eventCooling.tech2: Review of electrical capacity or coordination with a generator.
eventCooling.tech3: Equipment placement to reduce noise and visual clutter.
eventCooling.tech4: A functional test before the event starts.
eventCooling.trustText: 24clima.com is operated by WOW Soluciones Panama. Our owner is a Germany-trained HVAC Master with experience in air conditioning installation, maintenance and repair for residential and commercial clients in Panama. Service in Spanish and English for corporate events, hotels and international clients.
eventCooling.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about cooling rental
eventCooling.faq1Q: What information do you need to quote cooling for an event?
eventCooling.faq1A: Location, date and schedule, type of area (tent, terrace, hall, booth), approximate number of people and, if possible, photos or video of the space. With that we estimate equipment, power and installation.
eventCooling.faq2Q: Do portable units work for outdoor tents?
eventCooling.faq2A: In fully open spaces cooling is limited; it works best in closed or semi-closed tents. That is why we assess each case and recommend a realistic solution, without promising an exact temperature in open spaces.
eventCooling.faq3A: It depends on the power available on site. In every quote we state the electrical requirement and whether a generator makes sense; we can coordinate the generator with partners when the project requires it.
eventCooling.faq4Q: Can you leave a technician during the event?
eventCooling.faq4A: Yes, as an add-on. For VIP events, conferences and weddings we recommend a standby technician who can respond immediately to any adjustment.
eventCooling.faq5Q: What happens if it rains or the event is on an open terrace?
eventCooling.faq5A: We coordinate safe equipment placement, electrical protection and drainage. Rain does not lower the heat felt inside a closed tent; that is where real cold air makes the difference.
eventCooling.faq6Q: How far in advance should I book?
eventCooling.faq6A: The sooner the better — especially in the dry season (December to April), weddings and corporate fairs. For large events we recommend scheduling the site visit one to two weeks ahead.
eventCooling.ctaFooterTitle: Don't let the heat ruin your event
eventCooling.ctaFooterText: Send us the location, date, schedule, photos of the space and an approximate headcount. We reply with a realistic proposal.
eventCooling.whatsappMessage: Hello, I need air conditioning / cooling rental for an event in Panama. I'll share the date, location and number of people.
eventCooling.whatsappVisita: Hello, I'd like to request a technical site visit for cooling an event in Panama.
